text:
Lower Dressing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to dress and undress below the waist, including fasteners, excluding footwear at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to dress and undress below the waist, including fasteners, excluding footwear at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up
